modules.source_status_flag: Generated from approved Module 3 PDF source map.
learning_objectives: Identify and discuss the five basic physiological and psychosocial needs of all humans, as described by Maslow's Hierarchy of Needs.
Recognize and report patient/resident behaviors that reflect unmet human needs.
Define communication and therapeutic communication and identify two routes of communication.
Describe the key steps involved in the communication process and methods used in communication.
Describe effective communication/interpersonal skills used with patients/residents, their families and guests.
Describe conflict and measures for conflict resolution.
Discuss touch as a form of communication, including body language and personal space.
Describe family communication/interaction patterns and the role of the Nurse Assistant.
Describe social and cultural factors influencing communication and emotional reactions to illness and disability.
Describe communication between the members of the health care team.
